title: potentilla × fraterna
intro: Potentilla × fraterna, also known as Fraternal Cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla argentea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potentilla × fraterna include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Potentilla × fraterna is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
